mapper.select: SELECT card_id, name, company, benefits_json::text as benefits_json, benefits_detail_text, monthly_requirement, image_url, link, tags FROM projectdb.cards ORDER BY name
SELECT card_id, name, company, benefits_json::text as benefits_json, benefits_detail_text, monthly_requirement, image_url, link, tags FROM projectdb.cards WHERE card_id = #{cardId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO projectdb.cards (name, company, benefits_json, benefits_detail_text, monthly_requirement, image_url, link, tags) VALUES (#{name}, #{company}, #{benefitsJson}::jsonb, #{benefitsDetailText}, #{monthlyRequirement}, #{imageUrl}, #{link}, #{tags, typeHandler=com.smartbudget.config.StringArrayTypeHandler})
mapper.update: UPDATE projectdb.cards SET image_url = #{imageUrl} WHERE card_id = #{cardId}
UPDATE projectdb.cards SET link = #{link} WHERE name = #{name} AND company = #{company}
UPDATE projectdb.cards SET link = #{link} WHERE card_id = #{cardId}
mapper.select: SELECT product_id, type, name, bank, rate, conditions_json::text as conditions_json, tags FROM projectdb.products ORDER BY type, name
SELECT product_id, type, name, bank, rate, conditions_json::text as conditions_json, tags FROM projectdb.products WHERE type = #{type} ORDER BY rate DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO projectdb.products (type, name, bank, rate, conditions_json, tags) VALUES (#{type}, #{name}, #{bank}, #{rate}, #{conditionsJson}::jsonb, #{tags, typeHandler=com.smartbudget.config.StringArrayTypeHandler})
mapper.select: SELECT c.card_id, c.name, c.company, c.benefits_json::text as benefits_json, c.benefits_detail_text, c.monthly_requirement, c.image_url, c.link, c.tags FROM projectdb.user_cards uc JOIN projectdb.cards c ON uc.card_id = c.card_id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.name
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM projectdb.user_cards WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND card_id = #{cardId}
mapper.select: SELECT r.rec_id, r.year_month, r.rec_type, r.item_id, r.score, r.reason_text, r.created_at, r.user_id, CASE WHEN r.rec_type = 'CARD' THEN c.name WHEN r.rec_type = 'PRODUCT' THEN p.name END as item_name, CASE WHEN r.rec_type = 'CARD' THEN c.company WHEN r.rec_type = 'PRODUCT' THEN p.bank END as item_details FROM projectdb.recommendations r LEFT JOIN projectdb.cards c ON r.rec_type = 'CARD' AND r.item_id = c.card_id LEFT JOIN projectdb.products p ON r.rec_type = 'PRODUCT' AND r.item_id = p.product_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.rec_id, r.year_month, r.rec_type, r.item_id, r.score, r.reason_text, r.created_at, r.user_id, CASE WHEN r.rec_type = 'CARD' THEN c.name WHEN r.rec_type = 'PRODUCT' THEN p.name END as item_name, CASE WHEN r.rec_type = 'CARD' THEN c.company WHEN r.rec_type = 'PRODUCT' THEN p.bank END as item_details FROM projectdb.recommendations r LEFT JOIN projectdb.cards c ON r.rec_type = 'CARD' AND r.item_id = c.card_id LEFT JOIN projectdb.products p ON r.rec_type = 'PRODUCT' AND r.item_id = p.product_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.year_month = #{yearMonth} ORDER BY r.score DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO projectdb.recommendations (year_month, rec_type, item_id, score, reason_text, user_id) VALUES (#{yearMonth}, #{recType}, #{itemId}, #{score}, #{reasonText}, #{userId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM projectdb.recommendations WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND year_month = #{yearMonth}
